Course Review - The Analytics Edge

May 26, 2015

Having just completed the final piece of assessment (the final exam) for The Analytics Edge course here is my take on it. So far I have completed several online courses and this is by far the best I have come across. It has inspired me to want to learn more about analytics. The course uses real world examples of how analytics have been used to gain a competitive edge.

May 26, 2015

I have been putting off putting up a decent personal web site for a while and I then I ran into Jekyll when I was reading a GitHub related document. So here we go!
